element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Used in both platforming and side-scrolling beat'em up battles
Advanced combat technique for disposing of multiple enemies
Menu-based system contrasts with action battle flow; uses same items and skills
Core progression mechanic; feeds into side-scrolling battles
Contains random encounters and platforming sections

typical_relief_triggers: Completion of enemy waves in side-scrolling battles (ends when specific kill count reached)
Boss victory via turn-based RPG system
typical_tension_triggers: Random enemy encounter initiation on world map
Side-scrolling beat'em up battle start (multiple enemies on screen)
Boss encounter transition to turn-based system
Platforming section entry with horizontal-only movement constraint
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Hybrid pacing oscillates between exploration/overworld navigation (moderate tension) and intense side-scrolling action sequences (high tension); boss battles shift to turn-based rhythm (deliberate pacing)

difficulty_curve.early_game: Basic enemy encounters and platforming introduce core mechanics with manageable threat
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Progression through dungeon areas with escalating enemy variety and technique availability
notable_spikes: Boss battles shift game flow from action-oriented to turn-based menu system (mechanical difficulty spike)
Platforming sections constrain player to 2D left-right movement only (spatial constraint spike)

notable_level_patterns.description: Players navigate overworld and dungeons, triggering random enemy encounters that initiate side-scrolling beat'em up battles. Battles conclude upon reaching specific enemy kill count regardless of remaining enemies on screen.

Combat takes place in scrolling arena. Player can jump, punch, throw enemies, use shuriken items, and perform techniques (super jump, fireball). Depth of field enables 3D positioning unlike platforming sections.
Flat 2D platforming areas play identically to battles without depth dimension. Player can only move left/right, removing the spatial complexity of side-scrolling battles.
Boss encounters switch to traditional menu-based RPG combat system. Uses same items and techniques as action battles but requires strategic turn order planning.
